---
name: 💡 Content Suggestion
about: Suggest a new chapter, template, or improvement to the framework
title: '[Suggestion] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What is missing?**
Describe the gap in the current framework. (e.g., "There is no guidance on handling service animal relief areas.")

**Why is this important?**
Explain the impact. (e.g., "Without this, conventions might violate ADA rules or upset attendees.")

**Proposed Solution**
Do you have a draft or idea for how to address this?
- [ ] I have a draft ready
- [ ] I need help writing this

**Relevant Chapter**
Which chapter should this go in? (e.g., Chapter 4: Venue Assessment)
